Islam.quote: And whoever puts their trust in God, He will be enough for them.
Islam.meaning: Trust and sincere effort can bring inner peace during uncertainty.

Christianity.meaning: Treat others with kindness and compassion.

Buddhism.quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
Buddhism.meaning: Inner peace begins in the mind.

Hinduism.quote: You have the right to work, but never to the fruit of work.
Hinduism.meaning: Focus on effort rather than outcomes.
